source_tables.table_title: Schedule of Events for Protocol H2Q-MC-LZZT(c)
source_tables.table_purpose: Main schedule: screening (Visits 1-2) and first treatment-period visits (Visits 3-8, Weeks -2 to 8)

property_hierarchy.property_comment: Visit numbers (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, blank, 7, 8); one physical column between Visit 5 and Visit 7 has an empty header (no Visit 6 column value printed) - transcribed literally as an empty column. Classified as 'visit': row of visit identifiers.
Study week numbers (-2, -.3, 0, 2, 4, 6, 8). Classified as 'week': numeric week values aligned to visits.

source_tables.table_title: Schedule of Events for Protocol H2Q-MC-LZZT(c) (concluded)
source_tables.table_purpose: Continuation of the main schedule: Visits 9-13 (Weeks 12-26) plus Early Termination and Retrieval columns

property_hierarchy.property_comment: Visit numbers and end-of-study columns (9, 10, 11, 12, 13, ET, RT); ET = Early Termination, RT = Retrieval per abbreviation note. Classified as 'visit': row of visit identifiers.
Study week numbers (12, 16, 20, 24, 26; empty under ET and RT). Classified as 'week': numeric week values aligned to visits.

Visit numbers (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, blank, 7, 8); one physical column between Visit 5 and Visit 7 has an empty header (no Visit 6 column value printed) - transcribed literally as an empty column. Classified as 'visit': row of visit identifiers.
Study week numbers (-2, -.3, 0, 2, 4, 6, 8). Classified as 'week': numeric week values aligned to visits.

unified_activities.activity_name: CT Scan (if not within last year and patient passes all other screens)

name_variations: CT Scan (if not within last year and patient passes all other screens)

unified_activities.activity_name: Study drug record Medications dispensed Medications returned
unified_activities.qualified_key: ::Study drug record Medications dispensed Medications returned
name_variations: Study drug record Medications dispensed Medications returned

unified_annotations.annotation_text: Xa = Performed at this visit if patient is an insulin-dependent diabetic.
Xb = Performed at this visit and via telephone interview 2 weeks following this visit.

P = Practice only - It is recommended that a sampling of the CIBIC+, ADAS-Cog, DAD, and NPI-X be administered at Visit 1. Data from this sampling would not be considered as study data and would not be collected.
